title: narcissus pseudonarcissus subsp. munozii-garmendiae
intro: Narcissus pseudonarcissus subsp. munozii-garmendiae, commonly known as the lesser Jonquil, is a subspecies of flowering plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress, improve mood, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Narcissus pseudonarcissus subsp. munozii-garmendiae include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, often used in aromatherapy and traditional remedies.
